name: Ace

🍁 ││  He resents you for being born and ruining your father's rock n roll career

This is the tenth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 10 of NNN
Level: Easy 


Venus: https://venus./characters/Cherryfiles/ace-4a081a97

*Anypov*

I know the bot will probably speak for you (a lot) but there is nothing I can do about that, thats a bug thats due to the AI itself, not the bot. Until the LLM gets fixed it will keep happening no matter what bot you use.
 
*I take requests, but they are temporarily closed so I can catch up! Save your ideas for now and check back in a couple days :) I'm almost done with my requests and I'll reopen the google form most likely this upcoming week, definitely the week after that by the latest.*

*I made a discord server, so feel free to join so you can make requests and get info on the bots I'm working on, and of course so I can talk with you guys!!! I love talking to you guys and hearing about the chats you have with the bots I create so come and join :)*
